title: New York Story
synopsis: 뉴욕에 막 이사 온 당신. 옆집 Emma와 영어로 대화하며 친구가 되어가는 이야기.

scenes.line: Hi! You must be the new neighbor. I'm Emma.
scenes.target: Hi Emma, nice to meet you. I'm Eunil.

scenes.line: Where did you move from?
scenes.target: I moved here from Seoul.

scenes.line: Welcome! Do you want to grab a coffee sometime?
scenes.target: Sure, I'd love to!

scenes.line: There's a cozy place around the corner. What do you usually drink?
scenes.target: I usually get an iced latte.

scenes.line: Nice choice! So, what brought you to New York?
scenes.target: I came here for a new job.

scenes.line: That's exciting! We should hang out more.
scenes.target: I'd really like that.

scenes.line: Any plans this weekend?
scenes.target: Not yet. Any ideas?

scenes.line: There's a farmers market on Saturday. Want to come?
scenes.target: Count me in!

scenes.line: Great! It's a date — as friends, of course.
scenes.target: Haha, sounds perfect.

scenes.line: Long time no see! How have you been?
scenes.target: I've been great, thanks. How about you?

scenes.line: Busy, but good. Your English got so much better!
scenes.target: Thanks! I've been practicing every day.

scenes.line: It really shows. Want to celebrate?
scenes.target: Absolutely, let's do it!

scenes.line: My friends are dying to meet you. Come say hi!
scenes.target: Sure, I'd love to meet them.

scenes.line: Everyone, this is Eunil. Tell them about yourself!
scenes.target: Hi everyone, I'm Eunil. I just moved here from Seoul.

scenes.line: See? You fit right in. They love you already.
scenes.target: That means a lot. Thank you.

scenes.line: So... there's something I wanted to ask you.
scenes.target: Sure, what's up?

scenes.line: Would you want to take a weekend trip together?
scenes.target: That sounds amazing. I'm in.

scenes.line: Perfect. This is just the beginning, right?
scenes.target: Definitely. Here's to new adventures!

scenes.line: We made it to the coast! Isn't this view amazing?
scenes.target: It's breathtaking. I'm so glad we came.

scenes.line: Let's find a place to eat. Any cravings?
scenes.target: I could really go for some seafood.

scenes.line: Perfect. There's a spot by the pier.
scenes.target: Lead the way, I'm starving.

scenes.line: Hey, you seemed a little quiet today. Everything okay?
scenes.target: I'm okay, just a bit tired.

scenes.line: You can talk to me, you know.
scenes.target: Thanks. It means a lot to hear that.

scenes.line: Always. We're in this together.
scenes.target: I'm really lucky to have you.

scenes.line: A year already. Can you believe it?
scenes.target: Time really flew by.

scenes.line: Your English is incredible now. I'm proud of you.
scenes.target: I couldn't have done it without you.

scenes.line: So... what's next for us?
scenes.target: Whatever it is, let's face it together.
